description_long: This is a large, modern multi-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The exterior is predominantly white with expansive glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. A prominent feature is the spacious outdoor swimming pool, surrounded by a patio area with seating and landscaping, including several palm trees. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, some with glass railings, enhancing the open and airy feel. The main entryway is accessible via a set of steps and is flanked by large windows, giving the facade a balanced and inviting appearance. The overall layout is asymmetrical, with various volumes and setbacks creating visual interest and architectural depth.
description: A large, modern white house with flat roofs, expansive glass windows, and a prominent outdoor pool surrounded by palm trees. The design features multiple balconies, terraces, and an inviting main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, outdoor pool, and landscaped patio with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, multiple balconies, and the layered, boxy structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of windows, upper terraces, and palm trees lining the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the pool, terraces, and the staggered, modern volumes of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, large glass doors, and flanking windows, no porch or columns, minimalistic modern style
